meaning: There's no place like home.
wordForWord: Away is good, but home is best.

meaning: Practice makes perfect.
wordForWord: Practice gives skill.

sv: Bättre en fågel i handen än tio i skogen.
meaning: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
wordForWord: Better one bird in the hand than ten in the forest.

sv: Man ska inte sälja skinnet förrän björnen är skjuten.
meaning: Don't count your chickens before they hatch.
wordForWord: Don't sell the hide before the bear is shot.

meaning: Birds of a feather flock together.
wordForWord: Alike children play best.

sv: Många bäckar små gör en stor å.
meaning: Every little helps.
wordForWord: Many small streams make a big river.

meaning: The early bird catches the worm.
wordForWord: The morning hour has gold in its mouth.

sv: Rom byggdes inte på en dag.
meaning: Rome wasn't built in a day.

sv: Ju fler kockar, desto sämre soppa.
meaning: Too many cooks spoil the broth.
wordForWord: The more cooks, the worse the soup.

sv: Den som gapar över mycket mister ofta hela stycket.
meaning: Grasp all, lose all.
wordForWord: He who gapes over much often loses the whole piece.

sv: Man saknar inte kon förrän båset är tomt.
meaning: You don't know what you've got till it's gone.
wordForWord: You don't miss the cow until the stall is empty.

meaning: Better late than never.
All roads lead to Rome.
Appearances are deceptive.
wordForWord: The appearance deceives.

meaning: You're stronger on your own.
wordForWord: Alone is strong.

sv: Tala är silver, tiga är guld.
meaning: Speech is silver, silence is golden.

sv: Där det finns hjärterum finns det stjärterum.
meaning: There's always room for one more.
wordForWord: Where there's heart-room, there's rump-room.

sv: Som man bäddar får man ligga.
meaning: You've made your bed, now lie in it.
wordForWord: As you make the bed, you must lie.

meaning: There's no smoke without fire.

sv: Det är inte guld allt som glimmar.
meaning: All that glitters is not gold.

sv: Man ska inte kasta sten i glashus.
meaning: People in glass houses shouldn't throw stones.
wordForWord: You shouldn't throw stones in a glass house.

meaning: The end justifies the means.
wordForWord: The purpose sanctifies the means.

meaning: Necessity knows no law.
wordForWord: Necessity has no law.

meaning: Blood is thicker than water.
Discretion is the better part of valour.
wordForWord: Better to flee than to fight badly.

meaning: Time will tell.
wordForWord: He who lives will see.

meaning: A new broom sweeps clean.
wordForWord: New brooms sweep best.

meaning: Old love never dies.
wordForWord: Old love never rusts.

sv: Man ska smida medan järnet är varmt.
meaning: Strike while the iron is hot.
wordForWord: You should forge while the iron is hot.

meaning: Stick to what you know.
wordForWord: Cobbler, stay at your last.

sv: Var och en är sin egen lyckas smed.
meaning: Everyone is the architect of their own fortune.
wordForWord: Each is the smith of their own luck.

meaning: Empty vessels make the most noise.
wordForWord: Empty barrels rattle the most.

sv: Bättre stämma i bäcken än i ån.
meaning: Nip it in the bud.
wordForWord: Better to dam the stream than the river.

sv: Först till kvarn får först mala.
meaning: First come, first served.
wordForWord: First to the mill gets to grind first.

meaning: Sour grapes.
wordForWord: Sour, said the fox about the rowanberries.

sv: Man ska inte gråta över spilld mjölk.
meaning: Don't cry over spilt milk.

sv: Att gå över ån efter vatten.
meaning: to overcomplicate things needlessly
wordForWord: to cross the river to fetch water

meaning: to cast pearls before swine

sv: Att slå två flugor i en smäll.
meaning: to kill two birds with one stone
wordForWord: to hit two flies in one swat

sv: Att göra en höna av en fjäder.
meaning: to make a mountain out of a molehill
wordForWord: to make a hen out of a feather

meaning: to buy a pig in a poke
wordForWord: to buy the pig in the sack

sv: Att gå som katten kring het gröt.
meaning: to beat around the bush
wordForWord: to walk like the cat around hot porridge

meaning: no rush; nothing to worry about
wordForWord: no cow on the ice

meaning: no worries; nothing to fear
wordForWord: no danger on the roof

sv: Nu har du skitit i det blå skåpet.
meaning: Now you've really crossed the line.
wordForWord: Now you've shat in the blue cupboard.

meaning: to throw in the towel; to give up
Close but no cigar.
wordForWord: Near shoots no hare.

meaning: busy as a bee
wordForWord: diligent as a bee

meaning: fit as a fiddle
wordForWord: healthy as a nut kernel

sv: Att ha en räv bakom örat.
meaning: to be sly and cunning
wordForWord: to have a fox behind the ear

sv: Att ha tummen mitt i handen.
meaning: to be all thumbs; to be clumsy
wordForWord: to have the thumb in the middle of the hand

sv: Att ha ett finger med i spelet.
meaning: to have a finger in the pie; to be involved
wordForWord: to have a finger in the game

meaning: to put one's cards on the table
to take the bull by the horns

sv: Att sila mygg och svälja kameler.
meaning: to fuss over trifles while ignoring what matters
wordForWord: to strain gnats and swallow camels

meaning: to give up in despair
wordForWord: to throw the axe in the lake

meaning: to have divided loyalties
wordForWord: to sit on two chairs

sv: Att skära alla över en kam.
meaning: to tar everyone with the same brush
wordForWord: to cut everyone with one comb

meaning: to sweep the problems under the rug
to add fuel to the fire
wordForWord: to pour petrol on the fire

meaning: to keep one's cool; to stay calm
wordForWord: to have ice in the stomach

sv: Att bita i det sura äpplet.
meaning: to bite the bullet
wordForWord: to bite into the sour apple

sv: Droppen som fick bägaren att rinna över.
meaning: the last straw
wordForWord: the drop that made the cup overflow

meaning: to hit the nail on the head

sv: Att vara ute på hal is.
meaning: to be on thin ice
wordForWord: to be out on slippery ice

sv: Att ta sig vatten över huvudet.
meaning: to bite off more than you can chew
wordForWord: to take on water over one's head

meaning: Something smells fishy.
wordForWord: It reeks of cat.

meaning: to smell a rat; to sense something is wrong
wordForWord: to sense owls in the bog

meaning: to talk nonsense
wordForWord: to talk in one's nightcap

meaning: to do someone a disservice by trying to help
wordForWord: to do someone a bear's favour

sv: Man ska inte ropa hej förrän man är över bäcken.
meaning: Don't celebrate too soon.
wordForWord: Don't shout hurray before you're across the stream.

meaning: A beloved thing goes by many names.
wordForWord: A dear child has many names.

sv: Det finns inget dåligt väder, bara dåliga kläder.
meaning: There's no bad weather, only bad clothing.

sv: Att ta det med en nypa salt.
meaning: to take it with a pinch of salt
It never rains but it pours.
wordForWord: A misfortune rarely comes alone.

meaning: Never say die.
wordForWord: Shame on the one who gives up.

sv: Man lär så länge man lever.
meaning: Live and learn.
wordForWord: One learns as long as one lives.

meaning: Seek and you shall find.
A barking dog never bites.
wordForWord: The dog that barks doesn't bite.

meaning: Every cloud has a silver lining.
wordForWord: After rain comes sunshine.

sv: Att koka soppa på en spik.
meaning: to make much out of very little
wordForWord: to boil soup on a nail

sv: Att inte se skogen för alla träd.
meaning: to not see the forest for the trees
to get cold feet

sv: Man ska inte döma hunden efter håren.
meaning: Don't judge a book by its cover.
wordForWord: Don't judge the dog by its fur.

meaning: to bark up the wrong tree; to jump to a wrong conclusion
wordForWord: to jump into the wrong barrel

meaning: to turn a deaf ear

sv: Att stå med skägget i brevlådan.
meaning: to be caught out; to be left looking foolish
wordForWord: to stand with your beard in the mailbox

sv: Att ha rent mjöl i påsen.
meaning: to have nothing to hide
wordForWord: to have clean flour in the bag

meaning: to go to pot; to go badly wrong
wordForWord: to go towards the forest

meaning: Fair's fair.
wordForWord: Right shall be right.

meaning: One swallow doesn't make a summer.
Once bitten, twice shy.
wordForWord: A burnt child dreads the fire.

meaning: Waste not, want not.
wordForWord: He who saves, has.

meaning: Clothes make the man.

sv: Ingen är profet i sitt eget land.
meaning: No one is a prophet in their own land.

sv: Att gå från klarhet till klarhet.
meaning: to go from strength to strength
wordForWord: to go from clarity to clarity

sv: Att sätta sin sista skjorta på något.
meaning: to bet everything on something
wordForWord: to put your last shirt on something

sv: Att lova guld och gröna skogar.
meaning: to promise the moon
wordForWord: to promise gold and green forests

meaning: to be on the ball; to be sharp and eager
to go all out; to push the boat out

sv: Att kasta ut barnet med badvattnet.
meaning: to throw the baby out with the bathwater
slowly but surely
Something is better than nothing.
wordForWord: Better a little than nothing.

sv: Den ena handen vet inte vad den andra gör.
meaning: The one hand doesn't know what the other is doing.
That was a close call.
wordForWord: That was near the eye.
